title: IIM Visakhapatnam Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate -I Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam (IIM Visakhapatnam) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Associate I Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBA, B.E./B. Tech can apply for the IIM Visakhapatnam Jobs 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit,...
